query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME='dataOrigin' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME='dataOrigin' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
appointments	dataOrigin	enum('manual','system')
clients	dataOrigin	enum('manual','system')
projects	dataOrigin	enum('manual','system')
quotations	dataOrigin	enum('manual','system')
users	dataOrigin	enum('manual','system')
